steps: Reorganize folder structure
Improve SnakeController - smooth movement, speed scaling, better rotation
Improve GameManager - states, difficulty, scene management
Improve ScoreManager - combo system, multiplier, high score per difficulty
Improve FoodSpawner - weighted random, spawn animations, multiple specials at once
Improve Food.cs - new food types: Speed, Slow, Ghost, Shield
Improve UIManager - animated panels, combo display, shields UI, difficulty selector
Add AudioManager - sound effects and background music system
Add ScreenShakeManager - camera shake on eat/death
Add InputManager wrapper - unified keyboard/touch/gamepad
Add DifficultyManager - Easy/Normal/Hard/Extreme speed profiles
Add ComboSystem - combo multiplier with decay timer
Add SnakeTrailEffect - glowing trail on snake body
Add GridVisualizer - subtle animated background grid
Add GameOverEffect - snake death animation + screen flash
Improve SaveSystem - multiple save slots, cloud save ready
Add Settings - volume, vibration, color themes
Add mobile-specific: haptic feedback, safe area handling
Update manifest.json - add DOTween, 2D Animation packages
Git commit and push all changes
notes: Project: D:\github\Snake2.0 | Repo: https://github.com/ShwetankSingh123/Snake2.0.git | Unity URP 2D | Input System 1.14.2 | TextMeshPro | Has VFX prefabs for Normal/Golden/Bomb/Shrink food | Board.cs handles dynamic grid bounds | SnakeControls.inputactions handles touch+keyboard
